structural_claim: Quantum systems exhibit universal scaling behavior near critical points that depends only on symmetry and dimensionality

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Physical systems exhibit scale invariance at critical points with universal behavior

supporting_results.result_name: Onsager's Exact Solution of 2D Ising Model
supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Statistical mechanics produces singular behavior with exactly calculable critical exponents
Three-body systems near unitarity exhibit infinite tower of bound states with universal geometric scaling
Strong coupling exhibits scale-dependent behavior with universal running determined by symmetry
